articles.title: Minimalist Web Design
articles.content: Minimalism in web design is about removing unnecessary elements and focusing on the core content. It provides a clean, fast, and professional experience for users who value simplicity.

articles.title: Why Angular 21 is a Game Changer
articles.content: With the introduction of new reactivity primitives like Signals and a streamlined control flow, Angular 21 makes it easier than ever to build high-performance applications with less boilerplate.

articles.title: Clean Code Practices
articles.content: Writing clean code is essential for long-term maintainability. This includes using descriptive names, avoiding redundant comments, and keeping functions small and focused on a single task.
